subject: FSC dip after refinement
body:
Hi all,

I got an normal fsc curve after postprocessing in relion but I had an issue 
with fsc curve dipping at the low spatial frequency after refinement in M. 
I used temporal resolution at 3, and image warp only 3x3 and turned off 
other options. Are there any possible causes of this issue?

Best,
Mingyu
